APIErrorResponse.description:
APIErrorResponse is the top-level envelope wrapping a ResponseError.
All API error responses use this shape: { "error": { ... } }.

error.description: The error object containing details about what went wrong.

APIKey.description: APIKey represents an API key for authenticating API requests.

id.description: The unique identifier for the API key.

name.description: The human-readable name for the API key.

redacted_value.description: The redacted value of the API key for display purposes.

role.description: The role associated with this API key.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was last updated.

last_used_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was last used.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the API key expires.

revoked_at.description: The timestamp when the API key was revoked.

CreateAPIKeyRequest.description: The request to create an API key

role_id.description: The role ID for the API key.

name.description: The name for the API key.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration time for the API key.

CreateSandboxRequest.description: The request to create a sandbox.

name.description: The display name for the sandbox.

mode.description: Controls whether the sandbox is blank or seeded with tutorial data.

CreateUnitRequest.description: CreateUnitRequest is the request to create a new unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit (e.g. "Gram").

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit (e.g. "g").

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: The conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

is_base_unit.description: Whether this unit is the base unit for its dimension.

CreatedAPIKey.description: CreatedAPIKey represents a newly created API key with the full secret value.

api_key_secret.description: The full API key secret value (only shown once at creation).

LightAccount.description: LightAccount represents a minimal account reference.

id.description: The unique identifier for the account.

name.description: The display name of the account.

LightRole.description: LightRole represents a minimal role reference.

id.description: The unique identifier for the role.

name.description: The display name of the role.

List_APIKey.description: A paginated list of APIKey resources

data.description: Array of APIKey resources in this page

List_RequestLogListItem.description: A paginated list of RequestLogListItem resources

data.description: Array of RequestLogListItem resources in this page

List_Sandbox.description: A paginated list of Sandbox resources

data.description: Array of Sandbox resources in this page

List_Unit.description: A paginated list of Unit resources

data.description: Array of Unit resources in this page

next_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the next page of results, null if no more pages.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the previous page of results, null if on the first page.

has_next_page.description: Whether there are more results after this page.

has_prev_page.description: Whether there are results before this page.

QuotaInfo.description:
QuotaInfo provides machine-readable details about a plan-imposed resource limit.
Included in limit_exceeded errors so clients can display upgrade prompts, usage bars,
or implement programmatic retry/backoff logic.

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of resources allowed by the current plan.

used.description: Used is the number of resources currently consumed.

reset_at.description: ResetAt is the time when the quota resets, if applicable. Nil for static (non-metered) limits.

RequestLog.description: RequestLog represents a single API request log entry.

id.description: The unique identifier for the request log.

identity_type.description: The identity type of the caller.

error_code.description: The API error code, if any.

created_at.description: When the log entry was created.

account.description: The account targeted by the request.

RequestLogActor.description: RequestLogActor contains the resolved actor details for a request log.

id.description: The actor's ID (user ID or API key type_id).

redacted_value.description: The redacted API key value (API keys only).

role.description: The role assigned to the actor.

RequestLogListItem.description:
RequestLogListItem is the list representation of a request log entry.
It omits the request and response body JSON fields which are only
available when retrieving a single request log by ID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the request log.

identity_type.description: The identity type of the caller.

error_code.description: The API error code, if any.

created_at.description: When the log entry was created.

account.description: The account targeted by the request.

ResponseError.description:
ResponseError is the JSON-serializable error body returned to API clients. It contains
only public information. This struct is used by the OpenAPI schema generator to produce
documentation.

code.description: A machine-readable code for the error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

param.description: The parameter that caused the error, if applicable.

doc_url.description: A URL to documentation about the error.

is_transient.description: Whether this error is transient and the request can be retried.

quota.description: Quota provides plan limit details when the error is limit_exceeded. Nil otherwise.

request_log_url.description:
RequestLogURL is a link to the dashboard page for this request's log entry.
Nil when no request log is available.

RotateAPIKeyRequest.description: The request to rotate an API key, optionally overriding the expiration

expires_at.description: Optional expiration time override for the new API key.

Sandbox.description: Sandbox represents an isolated testing environment for an account.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sandbox.

name.description: The display name of the sandbox.

account_id.description: The ID of the account this sandbox belongs to.

updated_at.description: When this sandbox was last updated.

Unit.description: Unit represents a unit of measurement used for conversions and product quantities.

id.description: The unique identifier for the unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit (e.g. "Gram", "Kilogram").

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit (e.g. "g", "kg").

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, used for temperature-like conversions. Zero for most unit types.

is_base_unit.description: Whether this unit is the base unit for its dimension. Conversion ratios are relative to this unit.

is_internal.description: Whether this unit belongs to the requesting account. False for system/global units.

updated_at.description: When this unit was last updated.

UpdateUnitRequest.description: UpdateUnitRequest is the request to partially update a unit.

name.description: The display name of the unit.

abbreviation.description: The short abbreviation for the unit.

ratio_numerator.description: The conversion ratio numerator, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: The conversion ratio denominator, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: The conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: The conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

get.description:
This endpoint returns a paginated list of API keys for the target account.
Supports cursor-based pagination and optional search filtering by name.

parameters.description: Filter API keys by status.
parameters.name: status

200.description: Successful response for List API Keys

post.description:
This endpoint is used to create an API key. Once completed, the API key object is
returned, and the API key secret is returned. The secret is only returned once at creation, and is not retrievable after creation.

requestBody.description: The request body for Create API Key

201.description: Successful response for Create API Key

delete.description:
This endpoint revokes an API key so it can no longer be used to 
authenticate requests. The API key will be marked as revoked and will no longer be usable.

parameters.description: The ID of the API key to revoke.
parameters.name: id

200.description: Successful response for Revoke API Key

get.description: This endpoint returns a single API key's metadata by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the API key to retrieve.
parameters.name: id

200.description: Successful response for Get API Key

post.description:
This endpoint rotates an API key by revoking the existing key and creating a new
replacement with the same name, role, and owner. The new key inherits the old key's expiration unless an explicit expires_at override is provided.
The new API key secret is returned once and is not retrievable after creation.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the API key to rotate.
parameters.name: id

requestBody.description: The request body for Rotate API Key

201.description: Successful response for Rotate API Key

get.description:
This endpoint returns a paginated, filterable list of request logs for the target account.
Supports cursor-based pagination and various filters.

parameters.description: Cursor for fetching the next page, from a previous response's next_cursor field.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (default: 100, max: 1000).
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Search query: matches against ID (exact), path (partial), or error message (partial).
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter: start of date range for occurred_at.
parameters.name: start_date

parameters.description: Filter: end of date range for occurred_at.
parameters.name: end_date

parameters.description: Filter: HTTP method.
parameters.name: method

parameters.description: Filter: HTTP status code.
parameters.name: status_code

parameters.description: Filter: API error code.
parameters.name: error_code

parameters.description: Filter: actor's home account ID.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: Filter: actor ID.
parameters.name: actor_id

parameters.description: Filter: actor type ("user" or "api_key").
parameters.name: actor_type

parameters.description: Filter: actor name (partial or exact match).
parameters.name: actor_name

parameters.description: When true, string filters use exact match instead of partial (LIKE).
parameters.name: exact_match

200.description: Successful response for List Request Logs

get.description: This endpoint returns a single request log by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the request log to retrieve.
parameters.name: id

200.description: Successful response for Get Request Log

get.description:
This endpoint returns a paginated list of sandbox accounts for the target account.
Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.description: Cursor for fetching the next page, from a previous response's next_cursor field.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (default: 100, max: 1000).
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional search query to filter results.
parameters.name: q

post.description:
This endpoint creates a new sandbox account for the target account.
Enforces a per-account sandbox limit. Requires admin permissions.

requestBody.description: The request body for Create Sandbox

delete.description:
This endpoint deletes a sandbox account. At least one sandbox must remain
per production account. The sandbox and its account record are removed synchronously, and all
account-scoped data is purged asynchronously.

parameters.description: The ID of the sandbox to delete.
parameters.name: id

get.description: This endpoint returns a single sandbox account by its ID.

parameters.description: The ID of the sandbox to retrieve.
parameters.name: id

get.description:
This endpoint returns a paginated list of units for the target account, including both account-specific and global system units.
Supports cursor-based pagination, filtering by dimension type and unit group membership, and search by name or abbreviation.

parameters.description: Filter by unit dimension code (e.g. "mass", "quantity").
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter by unit group membership.
parameters.name: unit_group_ids

post.description: This endpoint creates a new account-owned unit.

requestBody.description: The request body for Create Unit

delete.description:
This endpoint deletes an account-owned unit.
Associated unit group memberships are also removed. System units cannot be deleted.

parameters.description: The ID of the unit to delete.
parameters.name: id

get.description:
This endpoint returns a single unit by its ID.
The unit must belong to the requesting account or be a system (global) unit.

parameters.description: The ID of the unit to retrieve.
parameters.name: id

patch.description:
This endpoint partially updates an account-owned unit.
Only provided fields are updated; absent fields retain their current values.
System units cannot be updated.

parameters.description: The ID of the unit to update.
parameters.name: id

requestBody.description: The request body for Update Unit

tags.description: Handles creating and managing API keys for programmatic access.
tags.name: API Key Management

tags.description: Handles listing and managing sandbox environments.
tags.name: Sandbox Management

tags.description: Handles listing and retrieving request logs.
tags.name: Request Log Management
